https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.title: Event Contracts
https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.content:
Event Contracts
Last update: April 8, 2026
OKX is launching Event Contracts in a three-tier hierarchy: Series → Event → Market. Markets are the tradable units aligned with OKX's existing instId system.
OKX will gradually roll out the all-new event contracts product for supported countries and regions starting April 10, 2026. All eligible users are expected to have trading access by April 14, 2026. Please note that this feature may not be available in your jurisdiction or region.
Refer to the product documentation and announcement for more details.
The following new endpoints will be added: Get series Get events Get markets Event contract markets channel
Get series
Retrieve the list of series for OKX prediction markets.
Rate Limit: 10 requests per 2 seconds
Rate limit rule: IP
Permission: Read
HTTP Request
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/series
Request Example
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/series?seriesId = BTC-ABOVE-DAILY
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description seriesId String No Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY . If not passed, all series will be returned.
Response Example
{ "code" : "0" , "data" : [ { "seriesId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY" , "freq" : "daily" , "title" : "BTC price above 15k" , "category" : "Crypto" , "settlement" : { "method" : "price_above" , "closeEarly" : false , "srcName" : "okx_index" , "underlying" : "BTC-USDT" } } ], "msg" : "" }
Response Parameters
Parameter Type Description seriesId String Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY freq String Frequency of the series fifteen_min daily title String Series title category String Category which this series belongs to, e.g. Crypto settlement Object Settlement information > method String Settlement method. price_up_down : Price up/down price_above : Price above > closeEarly Boolean Whether the market can be settled earlier than the expiration time. true false > srcName String Settlement source name, e.g. okx_index , cf_benchmark_index > underlying String Price underlying in OKX trading symbol format, e.g. BTC-USDT . Only applicable to price-related settlement methods.
Get events
Get events for a series in OKX prediction markets. Returns all event records, including expired ones. Return data in expTime and eventId descending order.
Rate Limit: 10 requests per 2 seconds
Rate limit rule: IP
Permission: Read
HTTP Request
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/events
Request Example
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/events?seriesId = BTC-ABOVE-DAILY
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description seriesId String Yes Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY eventId String No Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 state String No Event state filter. preopen live settling expired limit String No Number of results per request. Maximum is 100. Default is 100. before String No Pagination. Returns records newer than the requested expTime , not included. after String No Pagination. Returns records earlier than the requested expTime , not included.
Response Example
{ "code" : "0" , "data" : [ { "seriesId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY" , "eventId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600" , "expTime" : "1769697132335" , "state" : "live" } ], "msg" : "" }
Response Parameters
Parameter Type Description seriesId String Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY eventId String Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 fixTime String Strike price fixing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Only applicable to price_up_down settlement method. expTime String The specific strike time this event is based on, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 state String Event state. preopen live settling expired
Get markets
Get markets for events in OKX prediction markets. Return data in expTime and floorStrike descending order.
Rate Limit: 10 requests per 2 seconds
Rate limit rule: IP
Permission: Read
HTTP Request
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/markets
Request Example
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/markets?seriesId = BTC-ABOVE-DAILY
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description seriesId String Yes Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY eventId String No Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 instId String No Instrument ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000 state String No Filter by market status. preopen live settling expired limit String No Number of results per request. Maximum is 100. Default is 100. before String No Pagination. Returns records newer than the requested expTime , not included. after String No Pagination. Returns records earlier than the requested expTime , not included.
Response Example
{ "code" : "0" , "data" : [ { "seriesId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY" , "eventId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600" , "instId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000" , "listTime" : "1769697132335" , "expTime" : "1769697132335" , "state" : "live" , "fixTime" : "" , "outcome" : "0" , "floorStrike" : "120000" , "settleValue" : "" , "disputed" : false } ], "msg" : "" }
Response Parameters
Parameter Type Description seriesId String Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY eventId String Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 instId String Instrument ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000 listTime String Listing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 fixTime String Strike price fixing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Only applicable to price_up_down settlement method. expTime String Strike time for this event, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Updated once the market is settled. state String Market state. preopen live settling expired disputed Boolean Whether the market has been disputed. true false outcome String Market outcome. 0 : Not available 1 : YES 2 : NO. 1 / 2 only applicable when state is expired floorStrike String Minimum expiration value that leads to a YES outcome settleValue String Settlement value Only return when the state is expired
Event contract markets channel
Pushes event contract market status updates and floorStrike generation. No initial snapshot push.
URL Path
/ws/v5/public
Request Example
{ "op" : "subscribe" , "args" : [ { "channel" : "event-contract-markets" , "instType" : "EVENTS" } ] }
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description id String No Unique identifier of the message, 1-32 alphanumeric characters op String Yes Operation. subscribe unsubscribe args Array of objects Yes List of subscribed channels > channel String Yes Channel name. event-contract-markets > instType String Yes Instrument type. EVENTS
Response Example
{ "event" : "subscribe" , "arg" : { "channel" : "event-contract-markets" , "instType" : "EVENTS" } }
Push data example
{ "arg" : { "channel" : "event-contract-markets" }, "data" : [ { "seriesId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY" , "eventId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600" , "instId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000" , "listTime" : "1769697132335" , "fixTime" : "" , "expTime" : "1769697132335" , "state" : "live" , "outcome" : "0" , "floorStrike" : "120000" , "settleValue" : "" , "disputed" : false } ] }
Push data parameters
Parameter Type Description arg Object Subscribed channel > channel String Channel name data Array of objects Subscribed data > seriesId String Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY > eventId String Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 > instId String Instrument ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000 > listTime String Listing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 > fixTime String Strike price fixing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Only applicable to price_up_down settlement method. > expTime String Strike time for this event, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Updated once the market is settled. > state String Market state. preopen live settling expired > outcome String Market outcome. 0 : Not available 1 : YES 2 : NO 1 / 2 only applicable when state is expired > floorStrike String Minimum expiration value that leads to a YES outcome > settleValue String Settlement value Only return when the state is expired > disputed Boolean Whether the market has been disputed. true false
Changes to Existing Endpoints
instType request and response parameter adds new enum value EVENTS ; New request parameter seriesId required when instType is EVENTS ; new response parameter seriesId; state response parameter adds new enum value settling applicable to EVENTS : Get instruments Get instruments Instruments channel
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description instType String Yes Instrument type EVENTS : Event contracts seriesId String Conditional Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY . Required when instType is EVENTS
Response Parameters
Parameter Type Description instType String Instrument type EVENTS : Event contracts state String Instrument status settling : Only applicable to EVENTS seriesId String Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY . Only applicable to EVENTS
instType request parameter adds new enum value EVENTS to the following market data endpoints. For EVENTS , only YES market data is returned and NO market data should be derived by users; trade volume fields return contract number units only: GET / Tickers GET / Ticker WS / Tickers channel GET / Order book GET / Full order book WS / Order book channel GET / Candlesticks GET / Candlesticks history WS / Candlesticks channel GET / Trades GET / Trades history WS / Trades channel WS / All trades channel GET / 24H total volume Get open interest Open interest channel Get mark price Get mark price candlesticks Get mark price candlesticks history Mark price channel Mark price candlesticks channel
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description instType String Yes Instrument type EVENTS : Event contracts
instType request parameter adds new enum value EVENTS ; for EVENTS , instId is required for WebSocket subscription: Get estimated delivery/exercise price Estimated delivery/exercise/settlement price channel
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description instType String Yes Instrument type EVENTS : Event contracts instId String Conditional Instrument ID. Required when instType is EVENTS (WebSocket only)
New request parameter speedBump, required for non-post-only orders of EVENTS symbols: POST / Place order POST / Place multiple orders POST / Amend order POST / Amend multiple orders WS / Place order WS / Place multiple orders WS / Amend order WS / Amend multiple orders
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description speedBump String Conditional 1 : Event contract speed bumps (the delay duration will be changed subject to adjustment without prior notice). Required for non-post-only orders of EVENTS symbols.
New request parameter outcome optional for EVENTS : Get maximum order quantity
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description outcome String Conditional Market outcome to trade on. yes no Only applicable and optional for EVENTS , the default value is yes
New request parameter outcome required for EVENTS : POST / Place order POST / Place multiple orders WS / Place order WS / Place multiple orders POST / Order precheck
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description outcome String Conditional The market outcome users trade on. yes no Only applicable and required for EVENTS
New response parameter outcome; for EVENTS , the category field returns "delivery" for event contract settlement fills: GET / Order details GET / Order List GET / Order history (last 7 days) GET / Order history (last 3 months) WS / Order channel
Response Parameters
Parameter Type Description outcome String The market outcome the user traded on. yes no Only applicable to EVENTS
instType request, response parameter adds new enum value EVENTS : GET / Order details GET / Order List GET / Order history (last 7 days) GET / Order history (last 3 months) WS / Order channel Get positions Get positions history Positions channel Position risk warning
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description instType String No Instrument type EVENTS : Event contracts
For EVENTS , WS / Fills channel only returns data for the YES side regardless of whether the actual order was placed on YES or NO Updated taker and maker field descriptions to include EVENTS fee formula; new response parameter settle: Get fee rates
Response Parameters
Parameter Type Description taker String Taker fee rate for SPOT / MARGIN / SWAP / FUTURES / OPTION K1 parameter for EVENTS taker fee formula: round_up_3decimals(K1 × C × (P × (1-P))²) (C = number of contracts, P = price) maker String Maker fee rate for SPOT / MARGIN / SWAP / FUTURES / OPTION K2 parameter for EVENTS maker fee formula: round_up_3decimals(K2 × C × (P × (1-P))²) (C = number of contracts, P = price) settle String Settlement fee rate for users whose positions match the event contract settlement result. Users holding the opposite positions will not be charged during settlement. Only applicable to EVENTS
instType request parameter adds new enum value EVENTS ; new subType enum values for EVENTS trading and delivery: GET / Transaction details (last 3 days) GET / Transaction details (last 3 months) Get bills details (last 7 days) Get bills details (last 3 months)
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description instType String No Instrument type EVENTS : Event contracts
Response Parameters
type subType 2 (Trade) 410 : buy yes 411 : buy no 412 : sell yes 413 : sell no 3 (Delivery) 414 : yes expiry 415 : no expiry
Error Codes
Error code HTTP status code Error message 54086 200 You must set request parameter speedBump as 1 when you place or amend non-post-only orders for event contract symbols.

Event contract markets channel
Pushes event contract market status updates and floorStrike generation. No initial snapshot push.
URL Path
/ws/v5/public
Request Example
{ "op" : "subscribe" , "args" : [ { "channel" : "event-contract-markets" , "instType" : "EVENTS" } ] }
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description id String No Unique identifier of the message, 1-32 alphanumeric characters op String Yes Operation. subscribe unsubscribe args Array of objects Yes List of subscribed channels > channel String Yes Channel name. event-contract-markets > instType String Yes Instrument type. EVENTS
Response Example
{ "event" : "subscribe" , "arg" : { "channel" : "event-contract-markets" , "instType" : "EVENTS" } }
Push data example
{ "arg" : { "channel" : "event-contract-markets" }, "data" : [ { "seriesId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY" , "eventId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600" , "instId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000" , "listTime" : "1769697132335" , "fixTime" : "" , "expTime" : "1769697132335" , "state" : "live" , "outcome" : "0" , "floorStrike" : "120000" , "settleValue" : "" , "disputed" : false } ] }
Push data parameters
Parameter Type Description arg Object Subscribed channel > channel String Channel name data Array of objects Subscribed data > seriesId String Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY > eventId String Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 > instId String Instrument ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000 > listTime String Listing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 > fixTime String Strike price fixing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Only applicable to price_up_down settlement method. > expTime String Strike time for this event, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Updated once the market is settled. > state String Market state. preopen live settling expired > outcome String Market outcome. 0 : Not available 1 : YES 2 : NO 1 / 2 only applicable when state is expired > floorStrike String Minimum expiration value that leads to a YES outcome > settleValue String Settlement value Only return when the state is expired > disputed Boolean Whether the market has been disputed. true false

Get events
Get events for a series in OKX prediction markets. Returns all event records, including expired ones. Return data in expTime and eventId descending order.
Rate Limit: 10 requests per 2 seconds
Rate limit rule: IP
Permission: Read
HTTP Request
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/events
Request Example
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/events?seriesId = BTC-ABOVE-DAILY
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description seriesId String Yes Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY eventId String No Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 state String No Event state filter. preopen live settling expired limit String No Number of results per request. Maximum is 100. Default is 100. before String No Pagination. Returns records newer than the requested expTime , not included. after String No Pagination. Returns records earlier than the requested expTime , not included.
Response Example
{ "code" : "0" , "data" : [ { "seriesId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY" , "eventId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600" , "expTime" : "1769697132335" , "state" : "live" } ], "msg" : "" }
Response Parameters
Parameter Type Description seriesId String Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY eventId String Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 fixTime String Strike price fixing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Only applicable to price_up_down settlement method. expTime String The specific strike time this event is based on, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 state String Event state. preopen live settling expired

https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.content:
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description seriesId String Yes Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY eventId String No Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 instId String No Instrument ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000 state String No Filter by market status. preopen live settling expired limit String No Number of results per request. Maximum is 100. Default is 100. before String No Pagination. Returns records newer than the requested expTime , not included. after String No Pagination. Returns records earlier than the requested expTime , not included.
Response Example
{ "code" : "0" , "data" : [ { "seriesId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY" , "eventId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600" , "instId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000" , "listTime" : "1769697132335" , "expTime" : "1769697132335" , "state" : "live" , "fixTime" : "" , "outcome" : "0" , "floorStrike" : "120000" , "settleValue" : "" , "disputed" : false } ], "msg" : "" }

https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.title: Response Parameters
https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.content:
Response Parameters
Parameter Type Description seriesId String Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY eventId String Event ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600 instId String Instrument ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY-260224-1600-65000 listTime String Listing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 fixTime String Strike price fixing time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Only applicable to price_up_down settlement method. expTime String Strike time for this event, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds, e.g. 1597026383085 . Updated once the market is settled. state String Market state. preopen live settling expired disputed Boolean Whether the market has been disputed. true false outcome String Market outcome. 0 : Not available 1 : YES 2 : NO. 1 / 2 only applicable when state is expired floorStrike String Minimum expiration value that leads to a YES outcome settleValue String Settlement value Only return when the state is expired

https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.title: Get series
https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.content:
Get series
Retrieve the list of series for OKX prediction markets.
Rate Limit: 10 requests per 2 seconds
Rate limit rule: IP
Permission: Read
HTTP Request
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/series
Request Example
GET /api/v5/public/event-contract/series?seriesId = BTC-ABOVE-DAILY
Request Parameters
Parameter Type Required Description seriesId String No Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY . If not passed, all series will be returned.
Response Example
{ "code" : "0" , "data" : [ { "seriesId" : "BTC-ABOVE-DAILY" , "freq" : "daily" , "title" : "BTC price above 15k" , "category" : "Crypto" , "settlement" : { "method" : "price_above" , "closeEarly" : false , "srcName" : "okx_index" , "underlying" : "BTC-USDT" } } ], "msg" : "" }
Response Parameters
Parameter Type Description seriesId String Series ID, e.g. BTC-ABOVE-DAILY freq String Frequency of the series fifteen_min daily title String Series title category String Category which this series belongs to, e.g. Crypto settlement Object Settlement information > method String Settlement method. price_up_down : Price up/down price_above : Price above > closeEarly Boolean Whether the market can be settled earlier than the expiration time. true false > srcName String Settlement source name, e.g. okx_index , cf_benchmark_index > underlying String Price underlying in OKX trading symbol format, e.g. BTC-USDT . Only applicable to price-related settlement methods.

https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.title: Reclassification ofinstCategoryfor commodity instruments
https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.content:
Reclassification ofinstCategoryfor commodity instruments
Last update: April 13, 2026
The instCategory value for certain instruments will be reclassified. This change is expected to go live on April 21, 2026 .
Breaking change
The following instruments currently return instCategory = 1 (Crypto). After this change goes live, their instCategory will be changed to 4 (Commodities):
XAU-USDT-SWAP XAG-USDT-SWAP XPD-USDT-SWAP XPT-USDT-SWAP XCU-USDT-SWAP NG-USDT-SWAP CL-USDT-SWAP BZ-USDT-SWAP
Affected endpoints:
Get instruments (private) Get instruments (public) Instruments channel
If your application logic depends on the instCategory value for these instruments, please update accordingly before the go-live date.
